rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 3/10 score and reach the same conclusion through the same reasoning: the candidate fails the 8+ years of production AI experience requirement and lacks Python, vector databases, and RAG architecture experience. The strengths (15+ years, Staff-level, TypeScript/Node.js, cloud infrastructure, leadership) and concerns are the same substantive points reworded. No score change, new concern, or shifted reasoning keys off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to James Smith.
